meaning: adj.强烈的,剧烈的,热切的,热情的,激烈的
examples: It was a period of intense activity.
The battle for third place was intense.
The scene was palpably intense to watch.
Japan is under intense pressure to revive its long-moribund economy, especially as it sinks into recession.
According to Faneuil, the broker spoke of his relationship with Stewart, emphasizing their intense loyalty to each other.
